metadata.description: Official Claude plugins from CoinPaprika and DexPaprika: crypto market data, DEX analytics, liquidity pools, tokens, OHLCV, and more. Free APIs, no key needed.

plugins.name: dexpaprika
plugins.description: DeFi data across 34+ blockchains: DEXes, liquidity pools, tokens, OHLCV, transactions. 14 MCP tools, 4 skills, 1 agent. Free, no API key.

plugins.name: coinpaprika
plugins.description: Cryptocurrency market data for 12,000+ coins and 350+ exchanges: prices, tickers, OHLCV, contract lookups, tags, search. 29 MCP tools, 1 skill, 1 agent. Free tier, no API key.
